name: Saltimbocca-Style Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 can (28 oz) Cream of Chicken soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound each chicken filet to an even thickness between two sheets of waxed paper.
2. Place a slice of Prosciutto and a piece of Mozzarella cheese on each chicken filet, then roll up tightly and secure with a toothpick.
3. In a shallow dish, mix together flour, Parmesan cheese, salt, Sage, and pepper.
4. Dip the rolled-up chicken pieces in the seasoned flour mixture, ensuring they are well-coated.
5. Set aside to chill for at least one hour before cooking.
6. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
7. Sauté the chicken rolls on all sides until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side.
8. Transfer the sautéed chicken to a slow cooker.
9. Add the remaining soup mix and white wine to the slow cooker.
10. Cover and cook on LOW for 4-5 hours.
11. Adjust the heat setting to HIGH and thicken the sauce by stirring flour dissolved in a small amount of water.
12. Cook on HIGH for an additional 10 minutes before serving.
